@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix_skew_reject
C: abs_delta>"300" ∧ valid_sig ∧ provider_clock_drift
P: hard_cutoff_300 ∧ no_drift_margin ∧ edge_ts_mismatch
V: extend_window ∧ preserve_"401"_on_bad_sig ∧ reg_test_pass
A: set_tolerance_330 ∧ test_delta_299_305_331 ∧ assert_"401"_unsigned

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_skew_reject.
Constraints: abs_delta>"300" and valid_sig and provider_clock_drift.
Plan: hard_cutoff_300 and no_drift_margin and edge_ts_mismatch.
Verify: extend_window and preserve_"401"_on_bad_sig and reg_test_pass.
Answer target: set_tolerance_330 and test_delta_299_305_331 and assert_"401"_unsigned.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: encode_grace_"24h"_exact
C: overdue_middleware ∧ rule_overdue⇒"402" ∧ boundary_charge_loop
P: grace_window_"24h" ∧ timestamp_compare_strict ∧ block_reentry
V: "402"_emitted_once ∧ grace_"24h"_respected ∧ no_loop
A: min_fix_boundary_guard ∧ reg_test_grace_expiry ∧ reg_test_"402"_single

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: default_arch∧short_why
C: team_of_"9"∧ddl_"12 weeks"∧store_"PostgreSQL"∧compliance_ready
P: steady_traffic∧platform_plus_sec∧ops_owned
V: monolith_first∧"PostgreSQL"∧modular_boundaries∧compliance_layer
A: single_deployable∧"PostgreSQL"∧extract_services_post_"12 weeks"∧audit_schema_baked_in

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: async_enrichment_pipeline
C: team_size_"6" ∧ ddl_"9 weeks" ∧ store_"PostgreSQL" ∧ pt_mlops
P: worker_sidecar_split ∧ async_queue_ingest ∧ "PostgreSQL"_sink
V: "6"_devs_capacity ∧ "9 weeks"_feasibility ∧ pt_mlops_constraint
A: default_arch_fastapi_worker_sidecar ∧ short_why_fits_"9 weeks"_with_"6"_devs

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: path_traversal_risk
C: unsanitized_input ∧ direct_concat ∧ ".." ∧ exposes_arbitrary_files
P: validate_query_file ∧ reject_".." ∧ resolve_within_baseDir
V: path.resolve ∧ startsWith_check ∧ allowlist_extensions
A: sanitize_first ∧ then_"download" ∧ log_attempts

[AUDIT]
Goal: path_traversal_risk.
Constraints: unsanitized_input and direct_concat and ".." and exposes_arbitrary_files.
Plan: validate_query_file and reject_".." and resolve_within_baseDir.
Verify: path.resolve and startsWith_check and allowlist_extensions.
Answer target: sanitize_first and then_"download" and log_attempts.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_sqli_in_sort_param
C: unsanitized_input ∧ string_concat ∧ "SELECT" ∧ sql_injection_risk
V: define_allowed_sort_cols ∧ reject_if_not_in_allowlist ∧ parameterize_order_clause
A: block_merge ∧ require_allowlist_guard ∧ add_injection_test ∧ flag_critical

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_sqli_in_sort_param.
Constraints: unsanitized_input and string_concat and "SELECT" and sql_injection_risk.
Verify: define_allowed_sort_cols and reject_if_not_in_allowlist and parameterize_order_clause.
Answer target: block_merge and require_allowlist_guard and add_injection_test and flag_critical.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: reconcileBatch_async_refactor
C: load_batch∧db.fetchRows∧apply_rules∧db.save∧emit_metrics
P: "async"∧"await"∧minimal_change∧preserve_order
V: db_err_routes_to∧"next(err)"∧no_logic_change

[AUDIT]
Goal: reconcileBatch_async_refactor.
Constraints: load_batch and db.fetchRows and apply_rules and db.save and emit_metrics.
Plan: "async" and "await" and minimal_change and preserve_order.
Verify: db_err_routes_to and "next(err)" and no_logic_change.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: "async"∧"await"∧session_check_first∧order_preserved
P: db_err_routes_to_"next(err)"∧flags_load_after_db∧audit_before_next
V: minimal_change∧no_logic_drift∧anchors_present
A: deliver_async_await∧wrap_db_find∧wrap_flags_load∧audit_then_"next(err)"
